use_codes.desc: METHOD OF IRON ADMINISTRATION TO TREAT PATIENTS IN NEED OF IRON REPLACEMENT

indications.text:
Triferic is an iron replacement product indicated for the replacement of iron to maintain
hemoglobin in adult patients with hemodialysis-dependent chronic kidney disease (HDD-CKD).
1.1 Limitation of Use
Triferic is not intended for use in patients receiving peritoneal dialysis.
